title: rubus × pseudosubhispidulus
intro: Rubus × pseudosubhispidulus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a hybrid species of raspberry native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus × pseudosubhispidulus include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, Rubus × pseudosubhispidulus is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being incorporated into supplements and topical creams due to its potential to soothe and protect the skin.
